title: System of record
decision: Owned backend stores lead PII consent geocoding clusters reports and exports

title: DNS authority target
decision: Use Cloudflare as authoritative DNS after preflight
rationale: Cloudflare API and DNS tooling are better suited for automation

title: Initial Shopify integration
decision: Use Shopify landing page CTA to leads.bentondrones.com
rationale: Simpler safer launch than immediate App Proxy

title: App Proxy validation requirement
decision: Require HMAC/signature validation before production App Proxy trust

title: Dolt-backed local tracking
decision: Use repo-local portable Dolt plus CSV source/export tables
rationale: Winget installer was cancelled so portable Dolt was installed under ignored .tools
